summary: Last upgrade: UBS raised price target to $352 on April 14, 2026. Gary Alexander (Seeking Alpha) upgraded to Buy citing recovering Model 3/Y Europe sales and Cybercab/Optimus catalysts. Of 41 analysts: 19 Buy, 16 Hold, 6 Sell. Consensus: Hold/Buy. Last downgrade: Morgan Stanley December 2025.
